fact.comparison_rule: Observe declared task source and Brick contract only; do not choose Movement or judge success/quality.
fact.work_statement: review Brick for task-source:inline-statement: ADVERSARIAL REVIEW (read-only) of the UNCOMMITTED working-tree diff vs HEAD (git diff): the lane tool-policy three-tier repair. It claims: (1) a closed tier decision write/read/none with ambiguity failing closed to none; (2) write tier behavior unchanged; (3) read tier for reviewer-readonly / leader-coordination / no-write lead steps renders READ-ONLY inspection rules (files, search, diff, checker run) with NO edit/write/git permissions; (4) gemini stays none (documented); (5) QA/review/design brick contracts now REQUIRE repository-artifact references in returned evidence, and packet-only returns become missing required facts at comparison.
